title: Minecraft Refreshed: Create
description: A Simple Create Pack with Addons, Custom Worldgen and other QOL Mods.
body:
### Warning!
This Modpack still is in early alpha and many things may change and some worlds might break!

![Minecraft Refreshed Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8844821ab98ce2b0c94d721e2b3e7f4fb2a37e29.png)

# Summary
This is a Semi-Light Create Modpack with custom world generation

## Q&A

<details>
<summary>Is there a Server Pack?</summary>

Yes, go to the Versions tab and get the file from the additional files. Open the pack in Modrinth app to unpack it, but DO NOT run it through the app, instead open the folder and follow the instructions in the README. You should move the folder out of modrinth so it doesn't take up any space in your library!

</details>


Check out [my other Projects](https://modrinth.com/user/felix2011mario)!
